[finish]: In src/kiss/agents/sorcar/useful_tools.py, calls to `_kill_process_group` appear inside three distinct enclosing functions/methods:

1. `_stop_monitor` (module-level function, defined at line 447; call at line 459)
2. `Bash` (method, defined at line 856; calls at lines 913 and 932)
3. `_bash_streaming` (method, defined at line 984; calls at lines 1038, 1056, and 1060 — the calls at 1038/1056/1060 fall within `_bash_streaming`'s body, including its nested logic after the inner `_drain_stdout` helper, which itself does not call `_kill_process_group`)

So the distinct enclosing function/method names are: `_stop_monitor`, `Bash`, and `_bash_streaming`.
